#Kuwait affirmed Thursday achieving sustainable peace in the Middle East requires respect for international law, protection of civilians & implementation of relevant #UNSC resolutions. Kuwait called for safeguarding humanitarian institutions that support most vulnerable groups during times of conflict, foremost among them #UN Relief & Works Agency for Palestine Refugees (#UNRWA).  #Kuna

#Russian Ambassador to #Kuwait, Vladimir Zheltov, praised wisdom & foresight of Kuwait leadership & its balanced approach to regional & international issues, noting Kuwait & Russia continue to strengthen cooperation in various fields despite rapid changes the world is witnessing. He delivered a speech at a reception held by Russian Embassy Thursday to mark #Russia Day, in the presence of Deputy Foreign Minister Ambassador Hamad Al-Mashaan, ambassadors, diplomats & other dignitaries.  #Kuna

His Highness the Crown Prince received telephone call Thursday from #US President Donald Trump, reviewing latest developments on regional & international scenes, particularly those related to diplomatic efforts to de-escalate tensions in the region. The two leaders discussed ways to coordinate on the agreement expected to be reached between the US & Iran to end the war.  #Kuna #Kuwait

#Kuwait First Deputy Prime Minister and Interior Minister Sheikh Fahad Al-Sabah visited Thursday Ayed Al-Otaibi and other victims of the Iranian attack who are receiving treatment at Farwaniya Hospital to check on their health conditions and follow up on their medical care.  #Kuna

#US President Donald Trump announced Thursday calling off the attack on Iran which was planned tonight without mentioning further details. On his Truth Social account, Trump said, "based on the fact that discussions with the Islamic Republic of Iran have been brought to the highest level of Iranian leadership and approved, I have, as President of the United States of America, cancelled the scheduled strikes and bombings against Iran this evening."  #Kuna

#Kuwait's Public Authority of Civil Aviation (#PACA) announced Thursday it had sent 3rd official protest letter to International Civil Aviation Organization (#ICAO) regarding continued Iranian attacks on Kuwait International Airport. PACA the attack targeted the airport's radar earlier in the day, which had serious implications for safety & security of civil aviation operations.  #Kuna

#WorldBank Thursday lowered global growth forecast to 2.5% in 2026, attributing decline to repercussions of the war in Middle East. In its semiannual report titled "Global Economic Prospects," the bank said growth could slow to just 1.3% if energy supply disruptions intensify alongside severe pressures in financial markets.  #Kuna

RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: Today, we honoured 146 winners from across the UAE and GCC countries at the 2026 Dubai Quality Group Awards Ceremony, recognising outstanding achievements across eight local and international award categories. For more than three decades, these awards have celebrated organisations and individuals who are driving progress, innovation and sustainable growth. The Dubai Quality Group Awards continue to play an important role in promoting excellence and supporting Dubai’s ambition to remain a leading global centre for business, innovation and competitiveness.

RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: One of the most memorable moments of my visit to Sweden was meeting a group of children at Campus Manilla School, where I read excerpts from "From Desert Sand to Northern Stars," a story written especially for this visit to celebrate the shared human values that connect the children of the UAE and Sweden. The experience was a reminder of a simple yet important truth: no matter how different the environments in which we grow up, children’s dreams are remarkably alike, and we are united by common human values. RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: As part of my official visit to Sweden, I visited Lovable, one of the fastest-growing companies in the development of applications and websites, specialising in AI solutions. I also visited KTH Innovation, the Royal Institute of Technology's innovation arm, where I gained first-hand insight into its integrated approach to supporting the innovation ecosystem. The centre fosters creativity and helps transform ideas and scientific research into startups and ventures with tangible economic and social impact. استقبل اللواء الركن عوض سعيد بن مصلح الأحبابي، قائد العمليات المشتركة، في مكتبه، الفريق الركن فرانسوا كسافييه مابان، مفتش القوات المسلحة الفرنسية، والوفد المرافق له. وجرى خلال اللقاء بحث علاقات التعاون العسكري بين دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة والجمهورية الفرنسية وسبل تعزيزها وتطويرها، بما يخدم المصالح المشتركة للبلدين الصديقين، كما تم استعراض عدد من الموضوعات ذات الاهتمام المشترك في المجالات العسكرية والعملياتية. Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi held separate phone calls with his Turkish and Saudi counterparts to discuss the latest regional developments following US strikes on southern Iran.
#IRGC has released footage of its retaliatory missile operation targeting the #US bases and assets in the region #IranWar‌

Iran's Foreign Ministry has condemned US strikes on southern Iran in the early hours of Wednesday as a flagrant violation of the UN Charter, confirming Iranian Armed Forces struck US assets in the region in retaliation.
Iran's IRGC struck a U.S. airbase in Al-Azraq, Jordan, on Wednesday, hitting four key targets, including F-35 fighter shelters and a command and control centre with long-range solid-fuel missiles.
